fact_nuggets.text: Natural Cure (Japanese: Natural Recovery) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Recovers quickly from status problems. MD T D S Helps the Pokemon recover from status problems more quickly. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD Sometimes it cures every single bad status condition the Pokemon has! MD RT DX This Ability sometimes cures every bad status condition the Pokemon has.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generations IV to VII 1.1.3 Generation VIII onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Natural Cure heals any status conditions upon switching out. This effect will occur if Natural Cure is the Pokemon's Ability in battle when it switches out and is not suppressed; a Pokemon that obtained the Ability with Trace will have its status condition cured when it switches out, whereas a Pokemon which has Natural Cure but has been affected by Gastro Acid will not. Enemy trainers will only intentionally switch out a Pokemon with Natural Cure to heal them when they are asleep. Generations IV to VII [ edit | edit source ] Natural Cure also heals any status conditions upon completing a battle (if it was in battle at the end of the battle). Generation VIII onward [ edit | edit source ] Natural Cure no longer heals any status conditions upon completing a battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] From Generations IV to VII, Natural Cure automatically heals status conditions upon the end of a battle.

This effect will occur if Natural Cure is the Pokemon's Ability in battle when it switches out and is not suppressed; a Pokemon that obtained the Ability with Trace will have its status condition cured when it switches out, whereas a Pokemon which has Natural Cure but has been affected by Gastro Acid will not. Enemy trainers will only intentionally switch out a Pokemon with Natural Cure to heal them when they are asleep. Generations IV to VII [ edit | edit source ] Natural Cure also heals any status conditions upon completing a battle (if it was in battle at the end of the battle). Generation VIII onward [ edit | edit source ] Natural Cure no longer heals any status conditions upon completing a battle.
Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.
